summary: Numerical register from Incahuasi. 125 cords, 0 STRING, total 82,951. W(46)/NB(45)/AB(21) = dual-color data. 26 clusters. 13 L-1. Red thread run-through on C24.
interpretation:
IDENTIFICATION
  125 cords. 0 STRING, 101 INT, 11 EMPTY, 13 L-1.
  Architecture: 1-PAIRE, L2. Colors: W(46), NB(45), AB(21), KB(7), GG(3).
  Provenance: Incahuasi. Total: 82,951. OKR: C24 'red thread run through'.

NARRATIVE
  Eighty-two thousand nine hundred and fifty-one units of something, counted on 125 cords in two near-equal colors: white and near-black, forty-six and forty-five cords each. No words. The red thread run through cord 24 marks a specific entry — a validated measurement or a flagged exception, a single spot of color in a monochrome accounting register.
